decisionSummary: A dry-run/non-production gated write-review primitive was added. It can require a screen-shader watchdog gate for decoration.screen_shader in fixture review, reject ungated screen-shader fixture reviews, and accept gated fixture reviews backed by a valid dry-run watchdog plan. Production enforcement remains unchanged and compile-aware validation remains deferred.

proofUsed.finding: Added review_screen_shader_gated_write_plan as a dry-run/non-production wrapper around normal WriteReview. The normal review_write_plan path remains unchanged.
The primitive reuses existing HighRiskWatchdogPlan validation and dry-run/temp watchdog plans. It does not create a second watchdog framework.
Tests prove screen-shader detection, ungated fixture rejection, gated fixture acceptance with a dry-run watchdog plan, unrelated-row bypass, unchanged normal review, and mismatched proof rejection.
Existing watchdog migration proof remains complete and fixture/temp-only.

proofStillMissing: explicit approved behavior-change sprint to wire the dry-run primitive into production apply flow
production write-flow tests proving normal path-only approval is rejected by production enforcement after approval
live/production watchdog execution remains disabled and was not changed
compile-aware shader validation design remains deferred
standalone non-live shader compiler feasibility proof remains deferred
nextRecommendedSprint: Screen shader production gate enforcement approval sprint: decide whether to wire the proven dry-run gated-review primitive into production apply flow, with fixture/temp tests only, no live config/runtime mutation, and compile-aware validation still deferred.
